items.title: Education Dept. HQ handed to Energy as Trump advances effort to dismantle agency
items.desc: Education says it no longer needs the space after slashing half of its workforce.

items.title: Measles spike in federal detention facility reaches the Texas public, records show
items.desc: Most of the state’s measles cases reported so far this year are inside the West Texas Detention Facility in Hudspeth County, where four infected El Paso residents worked.

items.title: Speaker Dustin Burrows lists data centers, property taxes and annexing slice of New Mexico among 2027 priorities
items.desc: The Republican speaker’s interim charges also covered water resources, foreign threats and government accountability.

items.title: Legislators, business leaders highlight Texas policies driving competition with Wall Street
items.desc: The panelists at the Dallas event hosted by The Texas Tribune said “Y’all Street” is poised to become the nation's financial capital.

items.title: Texas suburbs lead U.S. for population growth as international migration slows, census finds
items.desc: Waller County, near Houston, was the second fastest growing county in the U.S. Another three Texas counties were among the 10 fastest growing in U.S.

items.title: Forced to sell medications at a loss, rural Texas pharmacies seek new survival tactics
items.desc: Independent rural pharmacists are starting other businesses or selling baby shower gifts to keep their stores operating. Pharmacy deserts affect 4 million Texans.

items.title: E&Ps Flag Iran War in Latest Dallas Fed Energy Survey
items.desc: The Iran war was highlighted by several exploration and production companies in the 'comments' section of the first quarter 2026 Dallas Fed Energy Survey.

items.title: Rystad Issues Oil Warning
items.desc: 'The floor has moved up, so has the ceiling', Rystad Energy said.

items.title: FluxPoint Energy Enters Race to Build First New U.S. Uranium Conversion Plant in Nearly 70 Years
items.desc: A new Texas-based startup has launched an effort to build what would be the first U.S. uranium conversion facility in more than seven decades to restore a domestic capability it says has become “an unacceptable chokepoint” in America&#821

items.title: California earmarks $848M for rail, road projects
items.desc: Of the funds, $100 million will support the construction of a 5-mile tunnel for Bay Area Rapid Transit trains between San Jose and the city of Santa Clara.

items.title: STAT+: Denali Therapeutics, Corcept Therapeutics win FDA approvals
items.desc: In today's Readout Newsletter, Denali and Corcept win FDA approvals, Sarepta eyes a rebound, and Allogene progresses with an off-the-shelf CAR-T.

items.desc: Education says it no longer needs the space after slashing half of its workforce.

items.title: ITFS 2026 Showcases Family and Industry Animation Activities
items.desc: The 33rd Stuttgart International Festival of Animated Film will present around 150 events, including the film competitions, outdoor screenings, workshops and games for audiences of all ages; runs May 5–10.

items.title: Vine FX Delivers Smoldering VFX on 'After the Flood' Season 2
items.desc: The Cambridge-based studio returns as sole vendor on the ITV crime drama, delivering 336 shots and 94 sequences combining fire simulation, Gaussian splatting, and invisible effects to support the series’ expanded environmental scope.

items.title: Sylvain Chomet’s ‘A Magnificent Life’: Animation More Real Than Reality
items.desc: The acclaimed, Oscar-nominated French director talks about his new film, his love of animation, and how if the acting, art, and editing are all good, your characters can feel more real than in live-action; in theaters March 27.

items.title: Baobab Studios Acquires Roblox Title Rights for Film and TV Development
items.desc: Company is developing animated projects based on 3 of the gaming giant’s most widely played titles - 'Natural Disaster Survival,' 'Barry's Prison Run,' and 'Deepwoken' - working with original creators to expand the properties for global audiences.

items.title: WEBTOON Unifies CANVAS with New Creator Tools and Translation Program
items.desc: The company will consolidate its regional user-generated content services into a single global platform, introducing expanded monetization, analytics, and multilingual distribution tools beginning in spring 2026.

items.title: Digital Design Days Celebrates 10th Anniversary With Most Ambitious Edition Ever
items.desc: Digital Design Days (DDD), Italy's leading design and innovation conference, celebrates its tenth anniversary with an extraordinary edition taking place May 7-9, 2026 at Superstudio Village in Milan.

items.desc: Twenty years in, Motionographer is getting a refresh - not just a redesign, but a rethinking. Dark mode, jobs on the homepage, a new Events page, and something big coming in May. Here's what's already live.
